headline: For Trump's 80th birthday, Dana White brings mixed martial arts to the White House
description: By staging a fight night for his birthday on Sunday, the US president is cementing his 25-year friendship with the head of the Ultimate Fighting Championship. He is also confirming his vision of politics as a violent spectacle between winners and losers.

headline: MAGA, macho, and ultraconservative: The man tasked with wooing tourists back to US
Gabriel Attal wants to reinvent Macronism
Death of schoolgirl forces French government into crisis communication
description: The French government is struggling to contain the political fallout from the murder of the 11-year-old girl. Justice Minister Gérald Darmanin has been especially active in trying to demonstrate that he bears no responsibility for any negligence in the handling of the suspect, Jérôme Barella.

headline: The Knicks, the soul of New York, are NBA champions after more than half a century of waiting
description: After a long period of anticipation and frustration, New York, where basketball is so much more than just a sport, finally celebrates, following its 94-90 triumph on Saturday in Game 5 of the NBA Finals against Victor Wembanyama's Spurs.

headline: Former French PM Fabius sees his art as 'a sharing of emotion'
description: Laurent Fabius gathered Socialist figures and a segment of the economic elite for the opening of his art exhibition at Galerie Joseph in Paris, on show until June 21.

headline: 2026 World Cup: Curaçao, a small nation with big ambitions
description: Just 444 square kilometers and home to slightly fewer than 160,000 people, Curaçao is set to become the smallest country ever to compete in a World Cup. Swiss photographer Mario Heller traveled to the Caribbean island to capture the anticipation, hopes, and popular fervor ahead of the biggest sporting event in its history.

At Dior, Jonathan Anderson is thinking long-term, not 'trendy'
description: One year after this arrival at Dior, the 41-year-old Northern Irish designer is still going at full throttle, releasing collections for Uniqlo and his own brand JW Anderson in addition to his 10 for the luxury label. His goal, he says, is to 'transform' the brand.

headline: Killing of Lyhanna: What we know about the previous accusations against the suspect
description: While awaiting the findings of the inquiries by the national gendarmerie's internal affairs body and the Justice Ministry's oversight authority, Le Monde has compiled the established facts and the outstanding questions surrounding the background of the suspect in the 11-year-old girl's murder.

headline: As France faces demographic decline, immigration emerges as both political and economic necessity
description: Immigration alone will not be enough to offset France's negative natural population growth in the medium and long term, according to the latest projections from the national statistics institute.

headline: The boycott of Nadav Lapid: An unacceptable essentialism
Boycott of Israeli filmmaker Nadav Lapid: 'A creator should not be reduced to their passport. It is time to stop denying their words, their actions and their work'
'In liberal democracies, the grace period for leaders rarely lasts more than six months'
